zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fowler於1520年4月1日出生在英國時，他的父親Roger Fowler41歲，母親Johanna Harman47歲。他於1536年與Alexandra Stephens在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1611年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾比士利享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fowler于1520年4月1日出生在英国时，他的父亲Roger Fowler41岁，母亲Johanna Harman47岁。他于1536年与Alexandra Stephens在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1611年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾比士利享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fowler was born on 1 April 1520, in England, his father, Roger Fowler, was 41 and his mother, Johanna Harman, was 47. He married Alexandra Stephens in 1536, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1611, in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fowler est né le 1 avril 1520, à Angleterre, son père, Roger Fowler, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Johanna Harman, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Alexandra Stephens en 1536, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1611, à Bisley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fowler am 1. April 1520 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Fowler 41 und seine Mutter Johanna Harman 47. Er hat 1536 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Alexandra Stephens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1611 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fowler è nato il il 1 aprile 1520 nel England, il suo padre, Roger Fowler, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Harman, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Alexandra Stephens nel 1536, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1611, nel Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fowler(이)가 1520년 4월 1일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Fowler(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Harman(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Alexandra Stephens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1611년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비슬리에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fowler родился 1 апреля 1520 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Fowler было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Johanna Harman, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Alexandra Stephens в 1536 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1611 г. в местности бисли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.
